text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While at the pool...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I swam like a fish out there,<n>but now I'm
stiff as a board. I think<n>that's enough for today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Nature! That was some good<n>trainin' out
there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Hishiama. I wouldn't call it good,<n>per say... It
was just a quick dip.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That so? Then how about an extra lapwith yours truly? I'll give you areal workout!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What? N-now? I couldn't... I'd just<n>be in your
way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't be shy! I can stick it<n>out till you're
cryin' uncle!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, greeeat... Hm? Wait... Any minute<n>now, she
should be...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually... before we start training,<n>there's
something I've been meaning<n>to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it? I'm all ears!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Great! I wanted to ask about legwork,<n>particularly
during a race...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...So this way you can use all the<n>power in your
legs when you run,<n>see?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. Who would've<n>thought... Yup,
this has really helped<n>me out.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Hishiama and Nature! Did you<n>get in a good
workout?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, right on sche—I mean, yeah, same<n>to you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, this racer's been having<n>trouble with
her swimming form.<n>She's been training
independently<n>very frequently as of late.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That so? You're better off asking me<n>for advice.
I'd be happy to check your<n>form for ya.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What, really?! Do you happen to have<n>some time
right now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Leave it to ol' Hishiama!<n>You can join
Nature for her training—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, no, I couldn't! I've already gotten<n>the advice I
was after.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pour all of your focus into her, I insist!<n>Anyhoo,
I'll catch you again some<n>other time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ooh, my back...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh, she was already on her last<n>legs? She
should've just told me<n>instead of dancing
around the topic.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, she did a fine job weaseling her<n>way out of
this one, but I won't let her<n>get away next time!
